title: We Have Rhymed
body:
WeHaveRhymed.com is a passion project I worked on from about 2022-2024. It is a collection of about 50 silly, borderline stupid, and very rarely introspective poems, each accompanied by a single-line drawing made in Sketch Club. This included a page of writing-tools that I developed to  be ad-free, simple tools All in one spot.
